record_note: Each round is one client-visible request to base_url. In disaggregated mode, per-round disagg_route (if present) records which prefill/decode node handled that request. Additional timing fields include client inter-round gaps and, when monitoring enrichment is available, decode-finish/client-end and client-send/prefill-arrival diagnostics.

Great, I found the `cli.py` file. Let's examine its content, focusing on the `print_doc` function mentioned in the PR description:

Now I can see the issue. In the `print_doc` function, there's a logical error in the handling of the `provider_or_field` parameter. The function first checks if `provider_or_field` exists (line 81), but in the `else` block (line 95), it tries to use `provider_or_field` without checking if it's `None`. This causes the error mentioned in the PR description when trying to check if "." is in `provider_or_field` (line 96).
